name: Composio Plus
description: Per-user Composio access via the TypeScript SDK. Exposes the six Composio meta-tools (search, schemas, multi-execute, manage-connections, workbench, bash). Supports custom tools, custom toolkits, and custom auth configs.

enabled.description: Enable or disable the Composio Plus integration

apiKey.description: Composio ak_... project API key (https://app.composio.dev/developers). Accepts a plain string or a secret-ref object resolved by openclaw's credential provider chain.

userId.description: Per-user Composio identity. One openclaw process per Composio user.

toolkits.description: Composio catalog toolkits the session should include (e.g. github, gmail).

authConfigs.description: Map of toolkit slug → ac_... auth config id. These are pinned at session creation so COMPOSIO_MANAGE_CONNECTIONS uses your custom OAuth app instead of Composio's managed default.

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.help: Composio ak_... project key from app.composio.dev/developers

userId.label: User ID
userId.help: Per-user identity (one openclaw process per Composio user)

toolkits.label: Toolkits
toolkits.help: Composio catalog toolkits the session exposes through meta-tools

authConfigs.label: Auth Configs
authConfigs.help: Custom OAuth apps / API-key auth configs
